scenes.text:
If you wait until you are
ready, you will wait forever.

Ready is a myth. It is a word your brain uses to keep you safe. Nobody who built something great was ready when they started. Jeff Bezos started
Amazon in his garage. Sara Blakely started Spanx with five thousand dollars and no business experience. They started with what they had, not what they wished they had.

You have enough right now to begin. Not to finish. Just to begin.
And beginning is the only thing standing between you and everything you want.

Start messy. Start scared.
Start underfunded. Just start.

What are you starting with? Share
your starting point. Follow for entrepreneurship.
